Call init() on the depositNFT contract (0xF0b7DE... for 88mph yaLINK pool)     to become its owner (no reinitialization guard). 2. As owner, burn the victim's deposit token (ID=10) representing 504.56 aLINK. 3. Re-mint the token to ourselves. 4. Buy ~5.38 MPH from SushiSwap to cover the takeBackDepositorReward penalty. 5. Approve MPHMinter to pull the MPH. 6. Call pool.earlyWithdraw(10, 0) \u2014 since we own token 10 now, the pool    thinks we're the original depositor and sends us the underlying aLINK. 7. The 504.56 aLINK is our profit.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/FlawVerifier.sol":"IERC20Like"},"evmVersion":"osaka","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/FlawVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x41e78279fc72b8b66f90a3b1bbb74ee2845ecd1905bbd2803a3d447bd4e7dd9c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f1496758d5f6d4cb4d782044cb542bac508276a9c9dbd4607d80efb86b569beb","dweb:/ipfs/QmbNMPuHikJmPYT8xcgfvWzgGeFr3Nq4ucShtSVRcqpWZs"]}},"version":1}
